title: Swim&Splash Inflatable Kids Boat, 112 x 70 cm, Age 3+, for Pools Beach Garden, Blue, Green
features: DIMENSIONS: Spacious kids' boat measuring 112 cm long and 70 cm wide, perfect for young water enthusiasts aged 3 and above
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for multiple water environments including swimming pools, beach outings, and garden water activities
COLOURFUL DESIGN: Vibrant sea-themed pattern featuring playful fish graphics that appeal to children while making the boat easily visible in water
EASY INFLATION: Quick and simple to inflate and deflate, with a practical pull string for convenient carrying when not in use
CONSTRUCTION: Durable PVC material with reinforced seams ensures stability and safety during water play
description: Make a splash this summer with the A to Z Swim&Splash Inflatable Kids Boat! Perfect for children aged 3 and above, this charming boat features delightful sea creature designs that will captivate young swimmers. Measuring 112 x 70 centimetres, it's ideally sized for little adventurers to enjoy safely in pools, at the beach, or even in the garden paddling pool. The boat comes in vibrant blue or green colours and sports playful decorations including cute fish and bubble patterns that bring underwater fun to life. Easy to inflate and deflate, this boat is practical for storage and transport. The durable construction provides a stable floating platform for water play, while the comfortable design includes raised sides for added security. A practical pull cord is attached for easy handling. This versatile water toy is perfect for summer holidays, weekend pool visits, or garden water play sessions. Please note that adult supervision is required at all times during water activities.
